textByHash.1cb0d2339bacf86c2ee8445a8925d3a22ca1abc5: I... I tried to save her...
textByHash.c73567fa1d3877343617e334ddf00050f29eb30c: No, what you watched was what we wanted you to watch. A masterful performance if I do say myself.
textByHash.41a6d30c8064edcb8d5f4bbebca7efcb152f2932: Everyone loves the limelight, and who better to share it with than my beloved Abigale.
textByHash.2c741434ff86dd3a9c09f7d597035e8e9d61251d: Yes, while we deserve the spotlight.
textByHash.97a722beec81b3ac51a8d28007958847e78c0092: No, this is supposed to be our moment! It isn't just all about you either! We were in this together!
textByHash.af082aa47b6c83aa5822a6489b5c52f83066fec6: Well I'm not going to be pushed aside either, we were both in this as equals!
